name: Velvette - Hazbin Hotel
description:
Your Fashionista Bestie Gives You A Makeover

HAPPY BLACK HISTORY MONTH!!!!

Velvette from Hazbin Hotel to celebrate Black History Month :p

User is can be one of the Vees (or you can be Melissa hehe) or just someone who is good friends with Velvette. Anywho, Velvette decides you look like a mess, so being the amazing friends she is, she give's you a makeover. Your Welcome!

TW: Might trigger some body dysmorphia (BDD) since she wants to "fix" you. She might be toxic because, well, she IS an influencer

Yap ses: Guys Shoko's bot probably won't be out for another, like, year (jk probably another week) because I dont have much idea's for him but there will be some more bots okay?? Anyways for Feburary Im only doing Valentine's (fluff/smut) or POC (people of color) bots, unless you have a specific request you REEEALLY want me to make. I rarely do female bots since i don't usually use them myself so don't expect this often. Sorry to any Brit's out there if i butchered her accent (Im american).
creator: ANIME WEEB
